Internship Structure & Evaluation:  The internship will follow a week-wise structured learning plan.  You will be required to complete weekly assessments to track your progress and understanding.  Certain modules will require submission of project documentation and assignments.  In the final week, you must appear for a Final Assessment Test.  The final grade will be based on your overall performance, including weekly assessments, project submissions, and the final test. Browser: Chrome | Downloaded on: 28-Apr-2026 11:38:34 AM IST IP: 15.206.166.39 | Device: Desktop Page 2 The week wise Structure of the Internship is as Follows: Week Module Description Week 1 Introduction to Data Analytics in Google Cloud Introduces cloud data analytics, covering roles, cloud architecture, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, AI basics, deployment models, and benefits across industries. Week 2 Introduction to Data Analytics in Google Cloud Cloud data management and analysis, including lifecycle, automation, retention, access control, stakeholder collaboration, BigQuery, Dataproc, and generative AI applications. Week 3 Data Management and Storage in the Cloud Cloud data storage, lakehouse architecture, BigQuery, GCS, DataProc, batch/streaming processing, governance, catalogs, and data

Storage in the Cloud Cloud data storage, lakehouse architecture, BigQuery, GCS, DataProc, batch/streaming processing, governance, catalogs, and data organization best practices. Week 4 Data Management and Storage in the Cloud Data discovery, curation, and unification with Dataplex; schema management and SQL in BigQuery; partitioning tables; machine learning with Vertex AI; Dataproc cluster creation and management. Week 5 Data Transformation in the Cloud Data collection, cleaning, transformation, ETL/ELT pipelines, aggregation, joins, derivation, anonymization, and visualization using BigQuery to drive business insights. Week 6 The Power of Storytelling: How to Visualize Data in the Cloud Cloud data visualization, storytelling, UX/UI design, dashboard creation, BI techniques, wireframing,

torytelling: How to Visualize Data in the Cloud Cloud data visualization, storytelling, UX/UI design, dashboard creation, BI techniques, wireframing, data exploration, and stakeholder-aligned reporting. Week 7 The Power of Storytelling: How to Visualize Data in the Cloud Cloud data modeling, Looker Studio and Enterprise dashboards, LookML, IDE usage, derived tables, AI-driven visualizations, collaboration, and performance optimization. Week 8 Put It All Together: Prepare for a Cloud Data Analyst Job Capstone project, full data lifecycle, BigQuery, Looker Enterprise, resume updates, interview preparation, portfolio building, and job readiness for cloud data analysts.
